name: test-guardian
description: Re-run failing tests every 5m during TDD
prompt:
TDD check. Run the test suite (try `pnpm test`, `npm test`, `bun test`, `pytest`, `cargo test` — use whichever matches the project).

Previous state: {state}

Report only if test results changed from last tick. If tests went from failing to passing: celebrate briefly. If a new failure appeared: report the new error message. If same failures as before: output [~].

Update state with current pass/fail counts via RoutineSetState.
